name: plan_proposal
description: Propose, approve, or retrieve task implementation plans isolated by session run.

action.description: Action to perform: 'create' a new plan, 'approve' the active plan, or 'get' the current plan.

files_to_modify.description: List of files intended to be modified (optional).

verification_commands.description: List of commands to run for task verification (optional).

run_id.description: Session run id (optional, auto-generated if not provided).
